title: Web Developer Extension
content:
I'm doing an unusual thing today. I'm going to introduce you guys to a new tools I've just found recently. It's called "Web Developer Extension":http://www.chrispederick.com/work/firefox/webdeveloper/ and it runs as a Firefox extension. %(me)Another reason for you to grab a copy of "Firefox":http://www.getfirefox.com.%

After you've installed the extension, you'll have a new toolbar called _Web Developer Toolbar_. It looks like this ...

!/gallery/webdevtool/thebar.png!

A very cool extension it is .. Here are the sample of what this thing can do.

!/gallery/webdevtool/blocksize.png!

.. display block size of each section

!/gallery/webdevtool/ids-classes.png!

.. display IDs and Classes

!/gallery/webdevtool/links.png!

.. display link paths

!/gallery/webdevtool/outline.png!

.. outline block of each elements

There are a lot more features but I guess you'll have to give it a try yourself.

Enjoy!
Have a nice day.

%(me)This is what happens when the NEWS are no longer NEW (meaning - same old boring news).%
